checkpoint_state: post-lambda / post-sigma-b / post-safe-phi-b / post-upsilon-a / post-phi-b3 / post-upsilon-b
notes_on_identifier_policy: Stable family identifiers are preferred over stale older Υ numbering in legacy planning mirrors.
Υ-C seed labels in this plan are local checkpoint labels anchored to repo-grounded family identifiers.

execution_order.title: RELEASE_REHEARSAL_SANDBOX_AND_PROOF_BACKED_ROLLBACK_ALIGNMENT-0
stop_conditions: rehearsal is treated as live permission or live-cutover proof
the prompt drifts into publication approval or trust execution
tool wrappers are used to redefine execution authority
execution_order.notes: This is the smallest next blocker-reduction step that meaningfully improves honesty around later hotswap review.

execution_order.title: CANARY_AND_DETERMINISTIC_DOWNGRADE_EXECUTION_ALIGNMENT-0
dependencies: deterministic downgrade and canary readiness evidence
stop_conditions: downgrade or canary work bypasses release contract profile or receipt continuity
the prompt claims publication authority from archive or mirror presence
runtime revocation choreography is treated as already implemented
execution_order.notes: This stays in the release-ops maturity band and must not become a proxy for live trust or publication execution.

execution_order.title: NEW CHECKPOINT BEFORE Φ-B4
stop_conditions: preceding work drifts into live-cutover claims
publication or trust execution posture expands
hotswap assumptions appear without new runtime evidence
execution_order.notes: Required before any reconsideration of Φ-B4.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: HOTSWAP_BOUNDARIES-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Still requires the additional rehearsal and rollback maturity band plus a fresh checkpoint.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: DISTRIBUTED_AUTHORITY_FOUNDATIONS-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Still lacks authority-handoff, quorum, distributed replay, and trust-bearing execution maturity.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: PUBLICATION_TRUST_EXECUTION_PREREQUISITE_ALIGNMENT-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Publication remains gated, trust policy remains provisional, and trust roots remain empty.

blocked_or_dangerous_items.title: LIVE_TRUST_ROOT_ROTATION_PREREQUISITES-0
blocked_or_dangerous_items.notes: Trust-root rotation remains explicitly under-founded for live execution.

why_better_than_alternatives: Running Φ-B4 next would still outrun the repo’s rehearsal and rollback maturity.
Running Φ-B5 next would outrun distributed and trust-bearing maturity by an even larger margin.
Running publication or trust execution work next would ignore that those areas remain strongly gated, provisional, or blocked.
A narrow Υ-first block directly reduces the remaining release-ops maturity blocker without smuggling in risky runtime execution.
